spell.name: Resistance Item
spell.description:
A nonmagical item imbued with this infusion grants a +1 resistance bonus on saving throws to a character who wears or wields it. This bonus increases by 1 for every four caster levels (to +2 at 4th-level, +3 at 8th-level, +4 at 12th-level, and so forth).

Material Component: Oil mixed with various spices and minerals.
spell.descriptionHtml:
A nonmagical item imbued with this infusion grants a +1 resistance bonus on saving throws to a character who wears or wields it. This bonus increases by 1 for every four caster levels (to +2 at 4th-level, +3 at 8th-level, +4 at 12th-level, and so forth).

Material Component: Oil mixed with various spices and minerals.

spell.name: Skill Enhancement
spell.description:
An item imbued with this infusion grants a +2 circumstance bonus on a specific skill check (determined by the caster) to a character who wears or wields it. This bonus increases by 1 for every two caster levels (to +3 at 2nd-level, +4 at 4th-level, +4 at 6th-level, and so forth).

Material Component: A length of fine, black thread.
spell.descriptionHtml:
An item imbued with this infusion grants a +2 circumstance bonus on a specific skill check (determined by the caster) to a character who wears or wields it. This bonus increases by 1 for every two caster levels (to +3 at 2nd-level, +4 at 4th-level, +4 at 6th-level, and so forth).

Material Component: A length of fine, black thread.
